---
title: Jittering and routing options for converting origin-destination data into route networks
date: 2022-08-26 08:00:00+00:00
tags:
  - "geocomputation"
  - "software"
  - "tools"
author: ["Robin Lovelace"]
---
## Jittering and routing options for converting origin-destination data into route networks 

**Event:** FOSS4G 2022

**Location:** Online

**Date:** 2022-08-26 08:00:00+00:00
